ui.hero_subtitle: — an intellectual tournament for those who want more. From algorithms to neural networks, from code to creativity.
ui.about_prob_text: Students lack practice and drive. Modern challenges require not only theory but also the ability to adapt quickly and outsmart artificial intelligence.
ui.about_hist_text: In 2022, we held the first Cup for 5 Kharkiv universities to boost activity during the pandemic. Now we are scaling up and launching new formats.
ui.about_team_title: Team & Soft Skills: Why it matters?
ui.about_team_text: In the modern IT world, hard skills are no longer enough. The ability to work in a team, communicate, assign roles, and support each other separates a simple coder from a leader. Our Side Activities and team competitions are designed to help you develop social skills, find like-minded people, and learn to win together.
ui.footer_desc: — an intellectual tournament combining algorithmic programming, artificial intelligence, and creativity.
ui.footer_rights: © 2026 Universities Cup Kharkiv. All rights reserved.

main_events.title: Prompt Evolution
main_events.for_whom: For architects of the future who can conquer AI with the power of thought and a perfect prompt.
main_events.desc: A team programming competition in Vibe Coding format. Participants do not write code directly but guide its creation via prompts to an LLM (Near AI). Tests algorithmic thinking and prompt engineering mastery.

main_events.title: Game Jam
main_events.for_whom: For unstoppable creatives ready to turn a wild idea into a gaming masterpiece in 5 hours.
main_events.desc: A 5-hour game development marathon. The goal is to create a fully working game based on a given classic mechanic. Evaluated on rules adherence, gameplay, design, and technical execution.

main_events.title: Final (Olympiad)
main_events.for_whom: For algorithm titans and future ICPC champions ready to challenge the hardest problems.
main_events.desc: Classic competitive programming format. A team of three, 5 hours, and a set of complex algorithmic problems. A test of stress resistance, deep knowledge of data structures, and role distribution.

main_events.title: UCup Cyber Day
main_events.for_whom: For esports players and students who want to experience the vibe of a real LAN tournament.
main_events.desc: Counter-Strike tournament in 5v5 format (Single Elimination). A LAN-party for tech students in Kharkiv to foster competitive spirit and networking.

side_events.title: Educational Weekend
side_events.for_whom: For everyone eager to learn, prepare for the Olympiad, or explore IT careers.
side_events.desc: Certification exams (IT Skills Standard), lectures, and intensive Olympiad preparation. Career guidance for school students with project presentations and masterclasses.

side_events.title: Side Activities
side_events.for_whom: For those seeking a balance between hardcode and fun.
side_events.desc: Not by code alone! Tournaments in chess, FPV drone racing, table tennis, and board games. The perfect time to switch your brain off and improve soft skills.
